title: Leaderboards
description: How leaderboard ranking is structured and how to use score comparisons effectively.
summary: Leaderboards support score comparison and progression benchmarks.
sourceNotes: Published leaderboard category names should be aligned with current App Store / Game Center configuration.
Update if additional categories are introduced.

sections.heading: How ranking works
paragraphs: Leaderboards compare score outcomes and let players benchmark against others.
Use these views to set concrete score targets for future sessions.
bullets: Use leaderboard context to set a realistic next target
Return regularly to keep score targets fresh

sections.heading: Recommended workflow
paragraphs: Review the board after each short block of sessions.
If your score dips, simplify goals and return to control-based practice.

sections.heading: Supported categories
paragraphs: The available categories and labels should match shipped game service settings.
Current documentation references the highest score category.

faq.question: How often do leaderboards update?
faq.answer: The leaderboard updates after score submission from valid gameplay sessions.

faq.question: What categories are shown in ZXSnake?
faq.answer: Current in-app labels should match the active Game Center category for ZXSnake.
